nasb.text: For I testify about them that they have a zeal for God, but not in accordance with knowledge.

esv.text: For I bear them witness that they have a zeal for God, but not according to knowledge.

cnv.text: 我可以為他們作證，他們對　神有熱心，但不是按著真見識；

ccb.text: 我可以证明，他们对上帝有热心，但不是基于真知。

csbs.text: 我见证他们对神有热心，但不是按着真正的认识。
